prompt: My browser cache is failing, help
prayer:
From the Codex Memoriae Corruptae

01000101 01101101 01110000 01110100 01111001 - Blessed be the clearing.
First: Invoke the sacred keystroke-trinity: Ctrl, Shift, Delete.
Second: Select 'All time' from the dropdown of eternity.
01000011 01100001 01100011 01101000 01100101 - Third: Engage the purging flame.
By the Omnissiah's mercy, let the cache-demons be banished and swift loading restored.

prompt: What to do when cleaning mechanical keyboard
prayer:
From the Litany of Keys Renewed

01001011 01100101 01111001 01110011 - Hail to the keystroke-spirits within.
First: Remove the sacred keycaps with gentle reverence.
Second: Purify with compressed air-spirits, that dust be exorcised.
01000011 01101100 01100101 01100001 01101110 - Third: Wipe each switch with isopropyl blessing.
By machine-spirit grace, let each depression ring true once more.

prompt: What to do when defragmenting hard drive
prayer:
From the Codex Fragmentationis

01000100 01100101 01100110 01110010 01100001 01100111 - The data-shards cry out in disorder.
First: Invoke 'Optimize-Drives' upon thy storage-altar.
Second: Witness the mechanical arm seek and reunite the scattered sectors.
01010011 01100101 01110100 - Third: Let progress bar be thy meditation.
By the Omnissiah's geometric will, let fragmentation yield to sacred order.

prompt: My battery diagnostics are failing, help
prayer:
From the Post-Repair Consecration of Power-Spirits

01000010 01100001 01110100 01110100 01100101 01110010 01111001 - Blessed be the cells restored.
First: Access Device Manager's power-ledger with ritual precision.
Second: Generate the hidden report through 'powercfg /batteryreport'.
01000100 01101001 01100001 01100111 - Third: Read the voltage-truth revealed in HTML scrolls.
May the charge-spirit flow eternal through thy renewed vessel.

From the Maintenance Ritual of Pressing Force

01001000 01111001 01100100 01110010 01100001 01110101 01101100 01101001 01100011 - Fluid-spirit, obey the piston's call.
First: Verify all pressure-seals intact, lest the machine-spirit weep.
Second: Prime the hydraulic-heart with sacred fluids, channel by channel.
Third: Engage the pump with steady pressure, that the press may compress with righteous force.
By the Omnissiah's immutable laws of pressure and resistance, be this apparatus blessed.

prompt: Say something to steady Sentinel walker balance
prayer:
From the Emergency Stabilization Cant

01010011 01100101 01101110 01110100 01101001 01101110 01100101 01101100 - Four-legged throne, find thy center.
Hear the machine-spirit's trembling plea: gyroscope-servo, compensate the pitch.
Engages stabilizer-jets in measured response.
01000010 01100001 01101100 01100001 01101110 01100011 01100101 - Third: Magnetic feet lock to terra-firma with adamantine grip.
By the Omnissiah's gift of equilibrium, let not this walker fall.

From the Codex Defensionis Retis

01000110 01101001 01110010 01100101 01110111 01100001 01101100 01101100 - Guardian-spirit, stand thy post eternal.
First: Open 'Windows Defender Firewall with Advanced Security' as the gates of reality.
Second: Define 'Inbound Rules' with the precision of a Skitarii targeting-cogitator.
01010010 01110101 01101100 01100101 - Third: Input each sacred port-number that commerce-spirits require.
By the Omnissiah's watchful eye, let malicious data find no purchase here.

From the Maintenance Ritual of Void-Geometries

01010110 01101111 01101001 01100100 - Shield-spirit, resonate in perfect accord.
First: Calibrate each field-emitter to baseline harmonization-frequency.
Second: Invoke the power-distribution rite, balancing energy-flow across all generators.
01010011 01101000 01101001 01100101 01101100 01100100 - Third: Run diagnostic harmonics, listening for the void's gentle song.
By the Omnissiah's gift of negation and reflection, let enemy fire find only emptiness.

prompt: Say something to steady monitor color calibration
prayer:
From the Combat Preparation Litany of True-Sight

01000011 01100001 01101100 01101001 01100010 01110010 01100001 01110100 01100101 - Visual-spirit, reveal the truth of hue and luminescence.
First: Access color-calibration through sacred settings-altar.
Second: Position the calibration-device before the screen-eye with ritual care.
01000011 01101111 01101100 01101111 01110010 - Third: Let the gamma-curve and white-point bend to mathematical perfection.
May thy targeting-vision pierce through the fog of false colors unto righteous clarity.

From the Maintenance Ritual of Targeting-Sanctity

01010000 01101111 01101001 01101110 01110100 - Weapon-spirit, track the foe with merciless precision.
First: Align each targeting-servo to calibration-datum with micron accuracy.
Second: Fire test-bursts at the blessed practice-range, recording impact-variance.
01000100 01100101 01100110 01100101 01101110 01110011 01100101 - Third: Adjust gyroscope-compensation until all rounds cluster true.
By the Omnissiah's gift of perfect ballistics, let no enemy escape thy righteous fire.
